AxReportDesign.Name: ReportMain
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <rd:DataSourceID>7b5337c2-3d41-4686-ab2f-19184fba2daa</rd:DataSourceID> </DataSource> </DataSources> <DataSets> <DataSet Name="ETGScaleTicketTmpDS"> <Query> <DataSourceName>AutoGen__ReportDataProvider</DataSourceName> <QueryParameters> <QueryParameter Name="AX_PartitionKey"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_CompanyName"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_UserContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RenderingCulture"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_ReportContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="parmScaleTicketNum"> <Value>=Parameters!DataSet1_parmScaleTicketNum.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM ETGScaleTicketReportDP.ETGScaleTicketReportTmp</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="BIN"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.BIN</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="BranchLocation"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.BranchLocation</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CarrierInfo"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.CarrierInfo</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Commodity"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Commodity</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CompanyLogo"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.CompanyLogo</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Byte[]</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CompanyName"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.CompanyName</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CompanyTeleFax"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.CompanyTeleFax</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Damage"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Damage</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Dockage"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Dockage</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="GradedAs"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.GradedAs</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Grading"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Grading</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Gross"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Gross</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Identification"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Identification</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="InspectedBy"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.InspectedBy</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="LastHauled"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.LastHauled</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Location"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Location</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Moisture"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Moisture</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Net"> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Operator"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Operator</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="PrintedDateTime"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.PrintedDateTime</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Producer"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Producer</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="RefPurchAgreementNum"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.RefPurchAgreementNum</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ScaleTicketNumber"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.ScaleTicketNumber</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ScaleUsed"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.ScaleUsed</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Shrinkage"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Shrinkage</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Splits"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Splits</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Tare"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Tare</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Unit"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Unit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Weights"> <DataField>ETGScaleTicketReportTmp.1.Weights</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> </Fields> <rd:DataSetInfo> <rd:DataSetName>ETGScaleTicketTmpDS</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod> <rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod>GetData</rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod> <rd:TableAdapterName>FieldsTableAdapter</rd:TableAdapterName> </rd:DataSetInfo> </DataSet> </DataSets> <ReportSections> <ReportSection> <Body> <ReportItems> <Rectangle Name="Rectangle1"> <ReportItems> <Textbox Name="Textbox1"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>ETG Commodities Inc.</Value> <Style> <FontFamily>Segoe UI</FontFamily> <FontSize>20pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox1</rd:DefaultName> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox1</rd:DefaultName> <Top>0.59111in</Top> <Left>1.36616in</Left> <Height>0.35in</Height> <Width>1.9in</Width> <ZIndex>1</ZIndex>
